content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the diff against origin/master and inspected the modified PID-cleanup and writer-lease paths in src/adapters/fs.rs, src/cli/run.rs, and src/contexts/automation_runtime/cli_writer_lease.rs. I did not find a concrete correctness, safety, or robustness issue in these changes. Targeted tests covering stale daemon PID cleanup and stop handoff behavior passed locally.

## Amendments

None.
